Powerful conquerors are appropriately compared to predatory birds or animals, but their destructive desires are controlled to advance God's plans. Those who turn away from God simply change their crimes by replacing one physical trust with another, and they will never prosper.

The parable is explained, and the details of the history of the Jewish nation at that time can be understood. Zedekiah was ungrateful to his benefactor, which is a sin against God. In every serious oath, God is appealed to as a witness of the sincerity of the person who swears. Truth is a debt owed to all people. If those who profess true religion betray those of false religion, their profession makes their sin worse; and God will certainly and severely punish it. The Lord will not hold guiltless those who misuse his name; and no one will escape the righteous judgment of God who dies with unrepented guilt.

People’s disbelief does not invalidate God's promise. The parable of a tree, used in the warning, is now presented in the promise. It appears to apply only to Jesus, the Son of David, God’s Messiah. Satan’s kingdom, which has held so much power for so long, will be broken, and Christ’s kingdom, which was looked down upon, will be established. Praise God, our Redeemer is seen even by the farthest regions of the earth. We may find safety from coming wrath and from every enemy and danger under his protection; and believers are fruitful in him.
